# CCFix

> A calmer kind of repair shop in Sydney. Phones, laptops, tablets and desktops fixed with care — free diagnosis, honest pricing, warranty included.

CCFix is a boutique device repair bench based at 95B Tallawong Rd, Rouse Hill NSW 2155, serving Sydney's northwest (Tallawong, Rouse Hill, Schofields, Riverstone, The Ponds, Stanhope Gardens, Kellyville, Marsden Park, Box Hill) and beyond. Open 08:00–21:00, 7 days. Call ahead and we'll book you in — free diagnosis on every job. Phone: +61 415 874 580. Email: ccfixsyd@gmail.com.

## Company

- [Homepage](https://ccfix.com.au/): Overview of CCFix and all repair categories.
- [Who We Are](https://ccfix.com.au/who-we-are/): Background on the bench and how CCFix works.

## iPhone Repairs

- [iPhone Repairs hub](https://ccfix.com.au/iphone/): Screens, batteries, charging ports, cameras and back glass — most iPhone models.
- [iPhone Screen Replacement](https://ccfix.com.au/iphone-screen-replacement/): Pick model and screen type (Incell or Soft OLED), instant price, X through 16.
- [iPhone Battery Replacement](https://ccfix.com.au/iphone-battery-replacement/): Pick model, instant price, premium aftermarket battery, X through 17.
- [iPhone 11 Screen Repair](https://ccfix.com.au/iphone-11-screen-repair/): iPhone 11 display replacement.
- [iPhone 15 Pro Screen Repair](https://ccfix.com.au/iphone-15-pro-screen-repair/): iPhone 15 Pro Soft OLED display replacement.
- [iPhone Camera Repair](https://ccfix.com.au/iphone-back-front-camera-repair/): Front and back camera diagnosis and repair.
- [iPhone Back Glass Repair](https://ccfix.com.au/iphone-back-glass-repair/): Rear glass replacement with wireless charging coil check.
- [iPhone Battery Repair](https://ccfix.com.au/iphone-battery-repair/): Battery health check and replacement.
- [iPhone Charging Port Repair](https://ccfix.com.au/iphone-charging-port-repair/): Charging port cleaning, repair and replacement.
- [iPhone Repair Tallawong](https://ccfix.com.au/iphone-repair-tallawong/): Local iPhone repair page for Tallawong and northwest suburbs.
- [iPhone Screen Replacement, Sydney](https://ccfix.com.au/iphone-screen-replacement-sydney/): iPhone screen replacement across Sydney's west.
- [iPhone X Screen Replacement Near Me](https://ccfix.com.au/iphone-x-screen-replacement-near-me/): iPhone X OLED display replacement.

## Samsung Galaxy Repairs

- [Samsung Galaxy Repairs hub](https://ccfix.com.au/galaxy/): Screens, batteries, charging ports, cameras and back glass across Galaxy S, A and Note.
- [Samsung Galaxy Screen Replacement](https://ccfix.com.au/samsung-galaxy-screen-replacement/): Curved AMOLED display replacement.
- [Samsung Galaxy Battery Replacement](https://ccfix.com.au/samsung-galaxy-battery-replacement/): Battery health check and replacement.
- [Samsung Galaxy Back Glass Replacement](https://ccfix.com.au/samsung-galaxy-back-glass-replacement/): Rear glass replacement, wireless charging and seal check.
- [Samsung Galaxy Camera Repairs](https://ccfix.com.au/samsung-galaxy-camera-repairs/): Camera fault diagnosis and repair.
- [Samsung Galaxy Charging Port Repair](https://ccfix.com.au/samsung-galaxy-charging-port-repair/): USB-C charging port repair and replacement.
- [Galaxy S20 Series Battery Replacement](https://ccfix.com.au/samsung-galaxy-s20-series-battery-change/): Battery replacement for S20, S20+, S20 Ultra.
- [Galaxy S21 Charging Port Replacement, Sydney](https://ccfix.com.au/samsung-galaxy-s21-charging-port-replacement-sydney/): USB-C port repair for the S21 series.
- [Samsung Phone Battery Replacement](https://ccfix.com.au/samsung-phone-battery-replacement/): Battery replacement across the full Samsung range.
- [Galaxy S9 Battery Replacement, Sydney](https://ccfix.com.au/samsung-s9-battery-replacement-sydney/): Battery replacement for older Galaxy S9 devices.
- [Samsung Phone Screen Repair](https://ccfix.com.au/samsung-screen-repair/): Screen replacement across the full Samsung range.

## Google Pixel Repairs

- [Google Pixel Repairs hub](https://ccfix.com.au/pixel/): Screens, batteries, charging ports, cameras and back glass for Pixel phones.

- [Google Pixel Camera Repair](https://ccfix.com.au/google-pixel-camera-repair/): Camera fault diagnosis and repair.

- [Google Pixel Screen Repairs, Sydney](https://ccfix.com.au/google-pixel-screen-repairs-sydney/): Pixel display replacement across Sydney's west.

## Laptop & MacBook Repairs

- [Laptop & MacBook Repairs hub](https://ccfix.com.au/laptop/): Screens, batteries, keyboards and more — Windows and Mac, most brands.
- [Laptop Screen Repair, Sydney](https://ccfix.com.au/laptop-screen-repair/): Display replacement across most laptop brands and models.
- [Laptop Battery Replacement](https://ccfix.com.au/laptop-battery-replacement/): Battery health check and replacement.
- [Laptop Bezel Repair](https://ccfix.com.au/laptop-bezel-repair/): Screen bezel repair and replacement.
- [MacBook Screen Replacement](https://ccfix.com.au/macbook-screen-replacement/): Display replacement across MacBook Pro, Air and older Mac laptops.
- [MacBook Air Screen Replacement](https://ccfix.com.au/macbook-air-screen-replacement/): Liquid Retina panel replacement for modern MacBook Air.
- [Older MacBook Air Screen Replacement](https://ccfix.com.au/mac-air-laptop-screen-replacement/): Display replacement for Intel-era MacBook Air.
- [Laptop Screen Replacement, Australia](https://ccfix.com.au/laptop-screen-replacement-australia/): Full display assembly replacement across most brands.
- [Dell Laptop Screen Repair](https://ccfix.com.au/dell-laptop-broken-screen/): Display repair for Inspiron, XPS and Latitude ranges.
- [Computer Repairs in Merrylands](https://ccfix.com.au/computer-repairs-merrylands/): Local laptop and desktop repair bench serving Merrylands, Parramatta, Guildford.

## Other Phone Brands

- [Mobile Phone Repairs hub](https://ccfix.com.au/mobile-phone/): Screens, batteries, charging and more for phones outside the main brands.
- [Mobile Phone Screen Repairs, Sydney](https://ccfix.com.au/mobile-phone-screen-repairs/): Display replacement across most phone brands and models.

## Local Area Pages (Sydney Northwest)

- [Phone Repair Tallawong](https://ccfix.com.au/phone-repair-tallawong/): Phone repair serving Tallawong, near Tallawong Station.
- [Phone Repair Rouse Hill](https://ccfix.com.au/phone-repair-rouse-hill/): Phone repair serving Rouse Hill, near Rouse Hill Town Centre.
- [Phone Repair Schofields](https://ccfix.com.au/phone-repair-schofields/): Phone repair serving Schofields, near Schofields Station and Garfield Rd.
- [Phone Repair Riverstone](https://ccfix.com.au/phone-repair-riverstone/): Phone repair serving Riverstone and the old township.
- [Phone Repair The Ponds](https://ccfix.com.au/phone-repair-the-ponds/): Phone repair serving The Ponds, near Caddies Creek.
- [Phone Repair Stanhope Gardens](https://ccfix.com.au/phone-repair-stanhope-gardens/): Phone repair serving Stanhope Gardens, near Stanhope Village.
- [Phone Repair Kellyville](https://ccfix.com.au/phone-repair-kellyville/): Phone repair serving Kellyville, near the Metro line.
- [Phone Repair Marsden Park](https://ccfix.com.au/phone-repair-marsden-park/): Phone repair serving Marsden Park, near Marsden Park Marketplace.
- [Phone Repair Box Hill](https://ccfix.com.au/phone-repair-box-hill/): Phone repair serving Box Hill and Vineyard.
